comment.body:
Hello Alma, Hope you had a good weekend.

Quick question for you, in your weekly post you wrote (inserted screenshot)

Am I understanding this wrong? For JPM, wouldnt they be:
- Above Long put: Short Delta, Short Vanna, Short Vega, Short Vomma, Long Charm, Long Theta ?

- Below Long put: Long Delta, Long Vanna, Long Vega, Long Vomma, Short Charm and Short Theta ?

comment.body:
TEACHER Qs :))
After reading my weekly post... https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/p/weekly-post-24-28march
1) considering the PnL, what is the 0DTE call position that the JPM uses on 31th of March in that last 2 housrs window: long or short? Is it an OTM, ATM or ITM call?

2) based on the weekly post solely, what dynamics one should watch to be realized (and at what lvls) for upside interest confirmation, and for downside interest confirmation?

for extra point:
+1) what one should see in the dynamics into Friday to prove or disprove the "hidden short put spread" thesis read from skew?
